visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair stands in a brightly lit retail environment, specifically the refrigerated seafood aisle of a Costco. She is wearing a cream-colored ribbed long-sleeve top and a black skirt. She holds a black plastic tray filled with neatly arranged orange salmon sashimi slices. Her facial expression is animated and surprised as she gestures toward the tray. Behind her, refrigerated display cases are filled with various packaged goods, and white tiled walls are visible. (2) The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of the salmon sashimi tray. The raw fish slices exhibit clear white fatty marbling and a glossy texture. A price label indicating '599' is briefly visible on a shelf in the background. A hand with pale nail polish points directly at the thick-cut pieces of salmon within the tray. (3) The shot returns to a medium shot of the woman in the store. She continues to talk enthusiastically, gesturing with her free hand. Another person's hand enters the frame from the left, pointing toward other salmon products on a lower shelf to provide a comparison. The lighting is bright and even studio-style. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting, likely a dining or living area. Two women are seated at a wooden table. One is the previous woman in a maroon top, and the other is wearing a yellow and white striped shirt with a red bucket hat. They are using chopsticks to pick up salmon from a light blue fish-shaped ceramic plate. The background features household items and warm interior lighting. (5) A close-up shot focuses on the blue fish-shaped plate, which is now partially filled with the salmon sashimi slices. The fish looks fresh and moist. Various small condiment dishes containing soy sauce and wasabi are placed on the table nearby. (6) The camera captures the two women as they taste the food. The woman in the red hat is talking and gesturing emphatically with her hands, looking toward the other woman and the camera. The other woman is focused on eating, showing a satisfied facial expression. (7) An extreme close-up shows a single thick slice of salmon being held up by green plastic chopsticks. The marbling is very prominent. Colorful graphic text overlays appear around the slice to emphasize its thickness. (8) The final phase shows both women looking at the camera and smiling. They appear to be in the middle of a lively conversation about the food. One woman holds her chopsticks near her mouth while the other continues to gesture, concluding their review in the warm home environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 竟然有鮭魚生魚片. [Variety]: 主食級的生魚片. [Subtitle]: 什麼!! 好市多. (2) [Subtitle]: 竟然有鮭魚生魚片. (3) [Subtitle]: 純生魚片沒有飯的欸. (4) [Subtitle]: 沒有加沙拉. (5) [Subtitle]: 也沒有加飯. (6) [Subtitle]: 好棒喔. (7) [Variety]: 生食級的生魚片. (8) [Subtitle]: 一盒450克 599元. (9) [Subtitle]: 回去看值不值得. (10) [Subtitle]: 它那麼的新鮮. (11) [Subtitle]: 究竟美不美味. (12) [Subtitle]: 欸不一樣喔. (13) [Subtitle]: 不然你看這種大塊的其實很便宜. (14) [Subtitle]: 這個不是生食的. (15) [Subtitle]: 對~但這個可以直接生食哇. (16) [Variety]: 鮭魚控 讚起來. (17) [Subtitle]: 好市多這一次的鮭魚生魚片. (18) [Variety]: 太值得買了. (19) [Subtitle]: 太值得買了. (20) [Subtitle]: 你看我們只裝一半進去. (21) [Subtitle]: 它是開封即食. (22) [Subtitle]: 然後有附兩包醬油. (23) [Subtitle]: 兩包哇沙米. (24) [Subtitle]: 最重要是它的鮭魚. (25) [Variety]: 非常的多. (26) [Subtitle]: 非常的多. (27) [Subtitle]: 口感非常的佳. (28) [Subtitle]: 然後油脂分佈的很均勻. (29) [Variety]: 味道很鮮甜. (30) [Subtitle]: 味道很鮮甜. (31) [Subtitle]: 當然它來自挪威. (32) [Subtitle]: 那個鮮甜度真的是. (33) [Variety]: 無與倫比的美麗. (34) [Subtitle]: 你吃下去只會一個字. (35) [Variety]: 爽. (36) [Subtitle]: 爽. (37) [Subtitle]: 一片只要30塊. (38) [Subtitle]: 值得.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator appearing in the store and home, 1 friend appearing in the home scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman in a cream-colored top then a maroon top; one woman in a yellow striped shirt and a red bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a Costco warehouse with refrigerated shelves and seafood packaging. The second location is a cozy indoor dining area with a wooden table and warm home lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins with a sharp exclamation of surprise. The speech rate is rapid and the tone is highly enthusiastic. An upbeat electronic pop background music (BGM) with a steady 4/4 synth beat starts simultaneously. (2) A clear 'ding' sound effect triggers as promotional text appears on the screen. The narrator continues describing the product price and weight with high articulation clarity. The BGM maintains a consistent, bright energy level with synthesized percussion. (3) A 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition to a new set of comments. The voice remains highly aroused, emphasizing the 'worth' of the purchase. The BGM tempo remains unchanged, providing a rhythmic bed for the narration. (4) The narrator’s voice exhibits a complex intonation pattern as she lists the included items like soy sauce and wasabi. Each item is punctuated by the rhythmic beat of the music. There is no background noise, indicating a studio-quality dub. (5) A resonant 'impact' SFX coincides with the description of the salmon's thickness. The voice pitch rises further to convey excitement. The BGM layering remains dense with bright synthesizers and a driving electronic bassline. (6) The vocal delivery becomes slightly more projected and assertive during the final taste-test summary. The pitch variability is high, conveying deep satisfaction. The BGM continues until the final second, ending abruptly with the narrator's last word.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping guide and food review for a specific Costco salmon sashimi product. It combines in-store discovery with a home-based taste test to prove the product's value, freshness, and quality, ultimately encouraging viewers to buy it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase, price mentioning, and strong positive verbal recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy short-form video typical of social media food influencers. Uses heavy visual and audio effects to maintain viewer engagement.
